question.text: The contract cycle for INR-based currency futures includes:

answer.text: 11 serial weekly cycles and 12 serial monthly trading cycles

explanation.text: **The Logic:** INR-based currency futures (USDINR, EURINR, GBPINR, JPYINR) have 11 serial weekly cycles (excluding the expiry week where monthly contracts expire on Friday) and 12 serial monthly cycles. **The Trap:** Cross-currency futures (EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY) have only 12 monthly cycles — no weekly contracts. **Cross-Exam Context:** Contract cycle details are specific to Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** New weekly/monthly contracts are introduced after the expiry of the respective contract, maintaining a rolling cycle.
